description: Form I-20 Certificate of Eligibility for Nonimmigrant Student Status issued to F-1 or M-1 students.

sevis_id.instruction: The SEVIS identification number assigned to the student, typically beginning with the letter N followed by numbers.

student_name.instruction: The full legal name of the student listed on the I-20 form.

date_of_birth.instruction: The student's date of birth as listed on the form.

country_of_birth.instruction: The country where the student was born.

country_of_citizenship.instruction: The country of citizenship listed for the student.

school_name.instruction: The name of the school issuing the I-20 form.

school_code.instruction: The SEVIS school code associated with the institution.

program_of_study.instruction: The student's major or field of study.

education_level.instruction: The academic level of the program such as bachelor's, master's, doctorate, or language training.

program_start_date.instruction: The start date of the academic program listed on the form.

program_end_date.instruction: The expected completion date of the academic program.

dso_name.instruction: The name of the Designated School Official who issued or signed the form.

issue_date.instruction: The date the I-20 form was issued or signed.
